name: Employer Contributions to Trump Accounts Exclusion

eligibility.description: Available for taxable years beginning after December 31, 2025. Requires a separate written employer plan meeting specific non-discrimination and benefit requirements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes from gross income up to $2,500 in employer-paid contributions to a Trump account for an employee or their dependents.
